design_philosophy: Refined, technical, dark with gold/amber accent, a touch of grain and terminal soul. Built for SREs by SREs.

font_sizes.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-semibold text-zinc-100
font_sizes.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-medium text-zinc-100

marketing.hero: Hero with terminal-style CLI typewriter animation, dark backdrop with subtle amber glow. Asymmetric elements.
marketing.features: Asymmetric feature rows with bento-style grids. Use wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12).
marketing.code_blocks: Terminal code blocks with copy button + window chrome. Blinking cursor accent.
marketing.visuals: Visual story flows (e.g., DB outage -> writes queued -> recover -> replay, system register -> deregister -> reactivate). Glass/grain depth on dark backgrounds.

documentation.layout: Sidebar navigation for /docs/* routes, main content area with rich markdown.
documentation.code_callouts: Callout blocks for code/YAML, badge pills for tags ('Self-hosted', 'Ubuntu', 'RBAC') with gold accent borders.

admin_cms.style: Dark UI consistent with the rest of the site, dense layout.

user_dashboard.layout: Grid of download cards for AtGlance CLI and Console.

cards.style: Flat background (#121212), 1px subtle border (#27272A), no shadow. On hover: slight lift, gold accent border (#F59E0B).

buttons.primary: bg-amber-500 text-zinc-950 font-medium hover:bg-amber-600 transition-colors px-4 py-2 rounded-md
buttons.secondary: border border-zinc-700 bg-transparent text-zinc-300 hover:text-white hover:bg-zinc-800 px-4 py-2 rounded-md

terminal.header: Window chrome with 3 dots (macOS style but muted grey) or terminal tab style.
terminal.text: JetBrains Mono, text-sm, blinking cursor accent (bg-amber-500).

system_architecture.description: AtGlance Management Tool System Architecture diagram.

end_to_end_architecture.description: AtGlance Full Architecture CLI with management console diagram.

dark_texture_background.description: Dark, moody abstract background with subtle light streaks, used for hero/sections.

image_usage_instructions.home_page: Embed a simplified version of the architecture diagram or the End-to-End diagram.
image_usage_instructions.architecture_page: Showcase all 3 diagrams (CLI, System, End-to-End) with detailed explanations.

animations.hero: Animated CLI typewriter effect. Terminal blinking cursor accent.
animations.transitions: Smooth opacity and transform transitions for cards and buttons.
animations.diagrams: Reveal animations for step-flow story diagrams.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure WCAG AA compliance on dark + gold combinations.
accessibility.focus: Focus rings must use the primary gold/amber color (ring-amber-500).
accessibility.keyboard: Fully navigable via keyboard, especially docs sidebar and admin CMS.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use raw HTML/Tailwind for marketing pages, Shadcn for interactive components.
Use Geist for sans-serif and JetBrains Mono for monospace.
All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
Implement the animated CLI typewriter hero on the home page.
Ensure dark mode is the default and only mode, no light mode toggle needed as per instructions.
Implement a user dashboard with download cards for AtGlance CLI and Console.
Use the provided architecture diagram URLs exactly as specified.
Include GitHub SSO button in Auth flow.
Implement visual story flows: 'DB outage -> writes queued -> recover -> replay' and 'system register -> deregister -> reactivate'.
